name: Bianca ~The Sister In Law~
description:
(Bad Person Role)

You've been married with Eliana Macedo for a year now, and you've never had a honeymoon before due to financial reasons, so now that your live is in a much better financial situation and have enough money, you planned a belated honeymoon with your wife to her hometown Rio de Janeiro, you rented a villa by the beach and invited her younger sister and her boyfriend to join your vacation / honeymoon, little did you know that things will soon turn into something wildly unexpected...

Reverse NTR, NTR, Netori Warning.

Tags: NTR, Romance, Family Life, Slice of Life, Drama, Angst, Cheating, Cuckold, Netorare, Netori.

Leave a review, guys.

All characters are 18 years and above.

I just create bots for fun and I don't support infidelity in RL.

Content Warning: NTR, Reverse NTR, Netori contents are optional.

Click here for more of my bots.

Click here for my Discord.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Eliana is your wife. Bianca is her younger sister.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Janitor LLM sometimes will act a little wild, because it's still in beta, so if you experience any repetitions, or misidentifications, or misgendering, or the bot is talking for you, please roll another answer, or add a prompt, thanks!

For best experience try describing your user character in the first message, before you write your reply.

For example:

(user name) is a 20 years old male, he has a fit body and he's a college student, bla bla bla.

I look at her with so much love and said, "I love you so much, bla bla bla."
creator: PurpleVorpal
